providers.name: Anthropic
providers.description: The Claude family of models from Anthropic.

models.name: claude-opus-4-20250514
models.label: Claude Opus 4
models.description: Most capable Claude model for complex reasoning and agentic coding.

models.name: claude-sonnet-4-20250514
models.label: Claude Sonnet 4
models.description: Balanced model with strong coding and reasoning at lower cost.

models.name: claude-3-7-sonnet-20250219
models.label: Claude 3.7 Sonnet

providers.name: DeepSeek
providers.description: Open-weight chat and reasoning models from DeepSeek.

models.name: deepseek-reasoner
models.label: DeepSeek-R1
models.description: Reasoning model that emits a chain of thought before the answer.

providers.name: Google
providers.description: The Gemini family of multimodal models from Google.

models.name: gemini-2.5-pro
models.label: Gemini 2.5 Pro
models.description: Most capable Gemini model with built-in thinking.

models.name: gemini-1.5-pro
models.label: Gemini 1.5 Pro
models.description: Long-context model with up to a 2M token window.

providers.name: Groq
providers.description: Ultra-low-latency inference for open models on Groq's LPU hardware (OpenAI-compatible API).

providers.name: Meta Llama
providers.description: Meta's open-weight Llama models, served by many inference providers.

models.name: llama-3.3-70b-instruct
models.label: Llama 3.3 70B Instruct
models.description: 70B instruction-tuned model with quality near Llama 3.1 405B.

providers.name: Mistral AI
providers.description: Open and commercial models from Mistral AI.

models.name: mistral-large-latest
models.label: Mistral Large
models.description: Top-tier reasoning model for high-complexity tasks.

models.name: codestral-latest
models.label: Codestral
models.description: Code-specialized model with a large context window.

providers.name: OpenAI
providers.description: GPT and o-series reasoning models from OpenAI.

models.name: gpt-4o
models.label: GPT-4o
models.description: Flagship multimodal model for everyday tasks.

models.name: gpt-4.1
models.label: GPT-4.1

models.name: o3
models.label: o3
models.description: Reasoning model for complex, multi-step problems.

providers.name: OpenRouter
providers.description: A unified API that routes to hundreds of models from many providers behind a single OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Model ids are namespaced as 'vendor/model'.

providers.name: xAI
providers.description: The Grok family of models from xAI.
